title: ServerEvent
description: Normalized internal event produced by the collector from any AMS source (REST poll, analytics-log tail, Kafka feed, webhook). Downstream storage and query layers depend ONLY on this shape, never on raw AMS formats — this is the portability boundary (PRD §7.11 expansion play). SKELETON.

data.description: Type-specific payload (viewer counts, bitrate, fps, packet loss, cpu/ram, ...) — finalized per event type by INT-01
